H

HandlerBox - Class in heif.boxes
This derived box, namely the hdlr type, declares media type of the track, and the process by which the media-data in the track is presented.
HandlerBox(Box, ByteStreamReader) - Constructor for class heif.boxes.HandlerBox
This constructor creates a derived Box object, extending the super class FullBox to provide more specific information about this box.
handlerType - Variable in class heif.boxes.HandlerBox
 
hasBrand(String) - Method in class heif.boxes.FileTypeBox
Checks if the specified brand is listed in the compatible brands.
hasExifData() - Method in interface common.Metadata
Indicates whether the container holds EXIF metadata.
hasExifData() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Checks if the metadata contains an embedded EXIF profile (eXIf chunk).
hasExifData() - Method in class tif.TifMetadata
Checks if the collection contains an EXIF sub-directory.
hashCode() - Method in class batch.MediaFile
Computes a hash code based on the media path, capture date, format, and metadata status.
hashCode() - Method in class png.PngChunk
Computes a hash code consistent with PngChunk.equals(java.lang.Object).
hashCode() - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
 
hashCode() - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Returns the hash code for this rational number.
hashCode() - Method in class webp.WebpChunk
Computes a hash code consistent with WebpChunk.equals(java.lang.Object).
hasIntegerValue() - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Checks if the rational number represents a whole number (an integer value).
hasKeyword(TextKeyword) - Method in class png.PngChunkITXT
Checks whether this chunk contains a specific textual keyword.
hasKeyword(TextKeyword) - Method in class png.PngChunkTEXT
Checks whether this chunk contains a specific textual keyword.
hasKeyword(TextKeyword) - Method in class png.PngChunkZTXT
Checks whether this chunk contains the specified textual keyword.
hasKeyword(TextKeyword) - Method in interface png.TextualChunk
Checks if this chunk matches a specific predefined keyword.
hasLength - Variable in enum jpg.JpgSegmentConstants
 
hasLengthField() - Method in enum jpg.JpgSegmentConstants
Returns true if this segment has a 2-byte length field following the marker.
hasMetadata() - Method in interface common.Metadata
Checks if the metadata collection contains any metadata entries.
hasMetadata() - Method in class jpg.JpgParser.JpgSegmentData
 
hasMetadata() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Checks if the PNG image contains any metadata directories.
hasMetadata() - Method in class tif.TifMetadata
Checks if the collection contains any metadata.
hasNoMetadata - Variable in class batch.MediaFile
 
hasRemaining(int) - Method in class common.SequentialByteArrayReader
Checks if at least the specified number of bytes are available to read.
hasTag(Taggable) - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD
Checks if the specified tag is present in this directory.
hasTextualData() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Checks if the metadata contains a directory for textual chunks (tEXt, zTXt, iTXt).
hasTextualData() - Method in interface png.PngMetadataProvider
 
hasXmpData() - Method in interface common.Metadata
Indicates whether the container holds XMP (Adobe Extensible Metadata Platform) metadata.
hasXmpData() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Checks if the metadata contains an XMP directory.
hasXmpData() - Method in class tif.TifMetadata
Checks if the collection contains an XMP directory.
heif - package heif
Provides high-level classes for parsing and manipulating HEIF-based files.
heif.boxes - package heif.boxes
Classes for parsing and representing individual HEIF-structured boxes.
HEIF_BYTE_ORDER - Static variable in class heif.BoxHandler
 
heifBoxMap - Variable in class heif.BoxHandler
 
HeifBoxType - Enum in heif
Defines all supported HEIF (High Efficiency Image File) box types.
HeifBoxType(String, HeifBoxType.BoxCategory) - Constructor for enum heif.HeifBoxType
Constructs a HeifBoxType enum constant with its 4-character identifier and category.
HeifBoxType.BoxCategory - Enum in heif
Describes the general role of the box in the file structure.
HeifDatePatcher - Class in heif
Provides utility methods for performing "in-place" binary patching of date-related metadata within HEIF/HEIC files.
HeifDatePatcher() - Constructor for class heif.HeifDatePatcher
Default constructor is unsupported and will always throw an exception.
HeifParser - Class in heif
Parses HEIF/HEIC image files and extracts embedded metadata.
HeifParser(String) - Constructor for class heif.HeifParser
Constructs an instance to parse a HEIC/HEIF file.
HeifParser(Path) - Constructor for class heif.HeifParser
Constructs an instance to parse a HEIC/HEIF file.
HeifPropertyInjector - Class in common
Provides functionality to inject transformative image properties (Mirroring, Clean Aperture, and Pixel Aspect Ratio) into an existing HEIF/HEIC file.
HeifPropertyInjector() - Constructor for class common.HeifPropertyInjector
 
heightD - Variable in class heif.boxes.CleanApertureBox
 
heightN - Variable in class heif.boxes.CleanApertureBox
 
HEX_ARRAY - Static variable in class common.ByteValueConverter
 
hierarchyDepth - Variable in class heif.boxes.Box
 
hint - Variable in enum png.TextKeyword
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagExif_Interop
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_GPS
 
hint - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Private
 
hOffD - Variable in class heif.boxes.CleanApertureBox
 
hOffN - Variable in class heif.boxes.CleanApertureBox
 
hour - Variable in class png.PngChunkTIME
 
hSpacing - Variable in class heif.boxes.PixelAspectRatioBox
